background: A study of vector control in an African village found that the mean sprayable surface area was 249 square feet with standard deviation 39.82 square feet in a simple random sample of n=100 homes.

task.query: Calculate a 95% confidence interval for μ.
task.answer: SE=39.82/√100=3.982 t_{100-1,1-(.05/2)}=t_{99, .975}=1.984 (via www.cytel.com/Products/StaTable/). If a computer program is not available, you can make use of the fact that program t_{99 .975} ≈ t_{100, .975}=1.984. 95% CI for μ=249 ±(1.984)(3.982)=249 ± 7.9=(241.1 to 256.9) square feet.

task.query: Would it be correct to say that 95% of all the homes in the village have sprayable surfaces between the lower confidence limit and upper confidence limit? Explain.
task.answer: It would not be correct to make this statement. The confidence interval applies to population mean μ, not to individual observations.

meta info.caption: Vector control in an African village
